prompt: 我想了解一下 Base 链上这个 token 0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913 的基本信息，包括名称、符号、精度和总供应量，还有当前 Base 链的 gas 价格

assertions.text: Retrieved and displayed the token name (USD Coin / USDC)
Retrieved and displayed the token symbol
Retrieved and displayed the token decimals (should be 6)
Retrieved and displayed the total supply as a human-readable number
Retrieved and displayed Base chain gas price in Gwei
All queries were executed on the Base chain, not Ethereum or another chain
